description.ko: iVH는 검증된 글로벌 휴머노이드 로봇에 AI와 운영 시스템을 결합하여 즉시 도입 가능한 토탈 패키지로 제공합니다.
description.en:
iVH provides a 'ready-to-deploy'
total package by integrating proven global humanoid platforms with our advanced AI and operating systems.

keywords.ko: 휴머노이드, Humanoid, 로봇, 토탈패키지, iVH, Physical AI, 디지털트윈, 운영시스템
keywords.en: Humanoid, Robot, Total Package, iVH, Physical AI, Digital Twin, Operating System

headline.ko: Humanoid Robots, Delivered as a Complete Solution
headline.en: Humanoid Robots, Delivered as a Complete Solution

segments.text:
iVH는 휴머노이드 로봇을 직접 개발하지 않습니다.
대신,
검증된 글로벌 휴머노이드 로봇에 AI와 운영 시스템을 결합하여 즉시 도입 가능한 토탈 패키지로 제공합니다.

body.en:
iVH does not develop humanoid robots directly. Instead, we provide a 'ready-to-deploy'
total package by integrating proven global humanoid platforms with our advanced AI and operating systems.

sub_body.ko: 휴머노이드는 연구가 아닌 실제 운영 관점에서 구매하고자 하는 기업을 위한 솔루션입니다.
sub_body.en:
This solution is designed for enterprises seeking to implement humanoid technology
for real-world operations, moving beyond simple research.

sub_headline.ko: : Humanoid Robots, Delivered as a Complete Solution
sub_headline.en: : Humanoid Robots, Delivered as a Complete Solution

description.ko:
iMOVA는 휴머노이드 로봇을 직접 개발하지 않습니다.
대신, 검증된 글로벌 휴머노이드 로봇에 AI와 운영 시스템을 결합하여
즉시 도입 가능한 토탈 패키지로 제공합니다.
description.en: iVH does not develop humanoid robots directly. Instead, we provide a 'ready-to-deploy' total package by integrating proven global humanoid platforms with our advanced AI and operating systems.

equation_text.ko: Robot Hardware + AI + Operation = iVH Total Package
equation_text.en: Robot Hardware + AI + Operation = iVH Total Package

body.en:
iVH’s humanoid business is not about robot manufacturing.
Instead, we focus on the following key roles:

segments.text: 글로벌 휴머노이드 로봇 제조사 (Hexagon, 중국 주요 휴머노이드 제조사 등)의

items.en: Sourcing Proven Hardware: Procurement of verified hardware from global humanoid manufacturers (e.g., Hexagon and leading Chinese humanoid developers).

segments.text: Physical AI, 디지털 트윈, 운영·관제 시스템 적용

items.en: Applying iVH’s Core Technologies: Implementation of iVH’s proprietary Physical AI, Digital Twins, and advanced Operation & Control Systems.
Integrated Solution Supply: Supplying a complete, integrated humanoid system ready for immediate use.

bullets.ko: 산업 및 특수 환경 적용 가능 플랫폼
bullets.en: Platforms Applicable to Industrial and Specialized Environments
Model Selection Based on Customer Requirements

note.ko: ※ 휴머노이드 하드웨어는 파트너 제조사 제품을 사용합니다.
note.en: ※ Humanoid hardware utilizes products from partner manufacturers.

bullets.en: Behavior Control Based on Task, Patrol, and Manipulation Scenarios

bullets.ko: 휴머노이드 실제 운영을 위한 안정화 로직
bullets.en: Stabilization Logic for Real-World Humanoid Operations
Motion and Mission Verification Before Field Deployment

bullets.ko: 기존 AMR, 설비, 보안 시스템 연동 가능
bullets.en: Integratable with Existing AMRs, Facilities, and Security Systems

subtitle2.ko: Why Not Just Buy a Robot?
subtitle2.en: Why Not Just Buy a Robot?

body.en: Purchasing a humanoid robot is only the beginning. In real-world operations, the following problems occur:

items.en: Single Point of Contact for Maintenance, Expansion, and Operation

closing.en: iVH provides humanoids as a 'System', not just a 'Product'.

segments.text: 연구 목적이 아닌 운영 목적으로 도입

하고자 하신다면,
iVH가 하드웨어 선정부터 운영까지 책임집니다.

body.en: For those seeking operational humanoids over research models, iVH takes charge of the entire process—from hardware sourcing to daily operation.
